scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && sh -c 'node server/dist/index.js & trap "kill $!" EXIT; npm run dev -w web'
